title: The Peanut Butter Heist

goal: Get the peanut butter jar down onto the floor and open it!

title: The Zero-G Toaster Dilemma
description: Gloop discovered an Earth kitchen appliance (a pop-up toaster) on a abandoned space station and thinks it is a sacred energy reactor.
goal: Toast a slice of bread inside the toaster without getting zapped or triggering zero-gravity floating bread chaos!
